meaning: n.<口>(宗教上的)教义,教条n.<旧英俚>淫妇,娼妇
examples: Can't be done by night, you heard what happens if anyone moves outdoors during darkness: Caterwauling Charm's set off, they'll be onto you like bowtruckles on doxy eggs.
Released on his own Doxy label, 2006's Sonny, Please marks the end of Rollins' epic 35-year stint at Milestone Records.
